ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batsmen" (
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batsman */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the batsman */,
  "player_link" INTEGER /* Link to the player's profile */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total balls faced */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Total number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Total number of sixes hit */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the batsman */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a single innings */,
  "number_of_fifties" INTEGER /* Number of 50+ scores */,
  "number_of_hundreds" INTEGER /* Number of 100+ scores */,
  "dots_balls" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls faced */,
  "boundary_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of runs scored in boundaries (fours and sixes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batsman_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batsmen_player_link FOREIGN KEY ("player_link") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dismissals" (
  "dismissal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dismissal */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman who was dismissed */,
  "bowler_catcher" TEXT /* Name of the bowler or catcher involved in the dismissal */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., lbw, c, b) */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Over number in which the dismissal occurred */,
  "ball_number" INTEGER /* Ball number in the over */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the dismissal occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dismissal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES batsmen ("batsman_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "profile_link" INTEGER /* Link to the player's profile */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., right-hand, left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., right-arm medium, left-arm orthodox) */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player ended their professional career (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "team_1" TEXT /* Name of the first team */,
  "team_2" TEXT /* Name of the second team */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (field or bat) */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Team that won the match */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (runs or wickets) */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_batsmen" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman who played in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "batsman_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_dismissals" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "dismissal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dismissal that occurred in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "dismissal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "home_ground_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player plays for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman */,
  "average_runs" REAL /* Average runs scored by the batsman */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the batsman across all matches */,
  "average_strike_rate" REAL /* Average strike rate of the batsman across all matches */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the batsman */,
  "best_match_score" INTEGER /* Best score in a single match */,
  "best_match_strike_rate" REAL /* Best strike rate in a single match */,
  "best_match_fours" INTEGER /* Best number of fours in a single match */,
  "best_match_sixes" INTEGER /* Best number of sixes in a single match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES batsmen ("batsman_id")
)
